title: NOT NULL constraint can't be applied after deleting rows with null values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (id INTEGER, name TEXT, age INTEGER CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO bar (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', NULL);
DELETE FROM bar WHERE age IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_bar AS SELECT * FROM bar WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE temp_bar RENAME TO bar;
key_bug_features: NOT NULL constraint applied after deleting null values
